_comment: Hand attribution for the 177 DMS lines the mechanical chain (sourceInSceneRef/tag/owner) could not resolve. These convos are script-triggered and carry no speaker metadata, so speakers were determined from convo names + content (2026-07-17). Applied by apply_unattributed.py. 'to' = default target char id or 'narrator'; 'nodes' = per-node overrides; 'skip': true = intentionally never voiced; 'review': true = low confidence, left unattributed for Martin.

new_characters.name: Eccher
new_characters.note: Troll construction contractor drinking at the Seamstresses Union bar

new_characters.name: Switchblade
new_characters.note: Street samurai teammate in the 3-years-ago dockside flashback; knew Dowd

new_characters.name: Sampson
new_characters.note: Troll bouncer at the Seamstresses Union stairs; goblinized, taken in by Mrs. Kubota

new_characters.name: Valerie Telestrian
new_characters.note: James Telestrian's institutionalized first wife at Mercy Mental; frail old woman, broken mind

new_characters.name: Fixer
new_characters.note: Junkyard fixer who brokers the meeting with the Mr. Johnson in c18

new_characters.name: Security Speaker
new_characters.note: Voice on a hidden loudspeaker at the c18 junkyard property
